text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Teach. I'm brainstormin' bento ideas for one
of my juniors.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Wouldn't it be fun to have little rice ball animals
surrounded by a forest made of veggies?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: You know, one of those cute character bentos!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
She could eat it in between training, and she's not
exactly expectin' fine dining, so I'm sure that'll
make 'er happy.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ah, if I recreated her favorite manga's cover in
bento form, she'd love it! All right, time to get
cookin'!
